title: ADCS Attacks
description: This module focuses on Active Directory Certificate Services (ADCS) and its potential misconfigurations. Misconfigurations can allow horizontal and vertical privilege escalation and lateral movement within a domain. It covers all domain escalation scenarios disclosed by SpecterOps and later discoveries, showing how to exploit them from both Windows and Linux systems. Each topic includes hands-on exercises, and the module concludes with a practical skills assessment. Prerequisites include knowledge of Active Directory Enumeration & Attacks and Kerberos Attacks.
